ZoneStatus.description: An irrigation zone's live state for the detail view, served alongside (not inside) the target bundle. The mutable targets — thresholds, schedule — ride on Setpoints.zones (ZoneTargets); this is the read-only live half the controller reports (platform-controller-control-rest ZoneStatus), keyed to a target by zone_id. The platform aggregates the controller's GET /zones into both.

soil_moisture_vwc.description: Latest soil-moisture reading (VWC, 0–1), or null when the zone's sensor is faulted/unavailable.

irrigating.description: Whether the zone's irrigation valve is currently open (watering now).

faulted.description: True when this zone's irrigation is disabled by a fault (sensor unavailable or an active zone fault; controller spec §7, §8).

last_cycle_ts.description: End of the most recent irrigation cycle (RFC 3339 UTC, ms), or null if the zone has not cycled yet.
